title: Pets Purest Scottish Salmon Oil For Dogs, Cats, Horse, Ferret - Pure Omega 3, 6 & 9 Fish Oil Food Treats Supplement for Natural Coat, Immune Support, Itchy Skin, Joint & Brain Health (500ml)
features: NO MORE ITCHY / DRY SKIN: Our ALL-NATURAL Scottish salmon oil formula is a liquid fish oil supplement designed to support any pets health, keeping them looking and feeling great. It is proven to reduce itching, dandruff and dry skin.

PACKED WITH OMEGA-3, 6, & 9 ESSENTIAL FATTY ACIDS: Our premium formula contains Omega-3, Omega-6, and Omega-9 fatty acids derived from EPA and DHA, known as triple omega. These nutrients help keep animal coats soft and support overall pet health.
HEALTHY PET BENEFITS: Simply add our salmon oil to any cat food, dog food, or pet food daily to help support brain and heart health. It also assists cell membrane formation and weight management.
JOINT SUPPLEMENT: Scottish salmon fish oil is widely recommended by vets as a pet assisted health aid for joint support, flaky skin, itch and hair loss.

DOGS, CATS & PETS LOVE IT: Hiding capsules and medication in your pets food can be very frustrating. Instead, simply pump the delicious liquid gel treat over your pets meal or medication and watch them devour every last drop. No mess, no fuss. Yum!

SUITABLE FOR ALL PETS, SIZES & BREEDS: Whether you have a cat, dog, kitten, puppy, senior, horse, ferret, or rabbit, our oil is suitable for ALL pets. Just adjust the serving size in line with the small to extra-large sized pet chart on the bottle.

100% NATURAL INGREDIENTS ONLY: Artificial preservatives have long term negative effects on pets so beware. We use an all natural E vitamins tocopherol antioxidant to help prolong our formula that assists the immune system and aids skin health.

HELP PRESERVE PET EYESIGHT: The rich DHA fatty acids found in our Scottish salmon fish oil for dogs, cats and pets can even help preserve pet eyesight and reduce the likelihood of eye problems in later life.

GRAIN & GLUTEN FREE: This a healthy hypoallergenic formula suitable for allergy prone pets with extra sensitive stomachs. There is absolutely no chemicals or nasties used in our pets supplies, which is something we pride ourselves on at Pets Purest.

specifications_table.Active Ingredients: Omega 3 (DHA 10-12%, EPA 7-9%), Omega 6, Omega 9, Natural Tocopherols
specifications_table.Benefits: Maintains healthy skin and coat; Aids joint mobility; Supports brain and heart health
